cells.data: Today there was a case where I did not follow procedures for proper programming skills. Rather than taking the time to understand what I need for the program to do, investigate and write down what needed to be added, and understand how it would be added, I just went ahead and started to play around with the code. For an hour I was there not understanding what was happening when I moved pieces of code around and was getting frustrated because I did not have a clear picture of why the computer was not doing what I was asking for it to do. That was my one big lesson for the day.
